title: Verify existing implementation of auth middleware
description: The auth middleware to protect routes is already fully implemented at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts. It extracts Bearer tokens from Authorization headers, verifies JWT signatures, returns 401 for missing/invalid/expired tokens, and attaches decoded user info (user, session) to request context. Comprehensive tests exist in src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts and all 8 tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: Middleware factory using createAuthMiddleware(userStore, sessionStore, jwtService) pattern
src/auth/jwt-service.ts: JWT sign/verify with HS256 HMAC, token blacklisting, access/refresh token helpers
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC wrapper for route handlers with role-based access control
src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts: Unit tests covering valid/invalid/missing/expired tokens, rate limiting
